messages.text: A searing wave of holy light routs you; the radiance sears your senses and scatters your defence.
{name} reels, routed and blinded by a searing wave of holy light.
The holy radiance fades and your senses and guard return.
{name} recovers from the searing holy light and steadies themselves.
{name} is reeling and routed, seared by holy light.
